alreadyLatest: You are already on the latest version
forceUpdateRequired: This update is required. Install it before continuing.

errors.httpsOnly: Only HTTPS download URLs are allowed

errors.downloadNoBody: Download response did not include a body

errors.prepareInstallFailed: Preparing installation failed. Please try again later.
